title: Tripleurospermum monticola
taxonomy: Tripleurospermum monticola is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the genus Tripleurospermum, which is a group of plants commonly known as mayweeds. The genus Tripleurospermum is a part of the tribe Anthemideae, and the family Asteraceae is a group of plants commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. These plants are known for their daisy-like flowers and are typically found in temperate and subalpine regions. Tripleurospermum monticola is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia.

preparations: Tripleurospermum monticola, also known as Mountain Chervil, is an herb that has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
